data.title: Waystar to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 29, 2026
data.description: Lehi, Utah and Louisville, Kentucky - On April 8, 2026, Waystar Holding Corp., a Nasdaq-listed (WAY) healthcare payment software provider, disclosed its plan to release first quarter financial figures for 2026, after markets shut on Wednesday, April ___.

data.title: Truth Initiative's EX Program Launches First Campaign to Include Nicotine Pouches as Gen Z Faces Troubling Rise in Use of Multiple Products
data.description: A nationwide campaign by Truth Initiative called Outsmart Nicotine has been launched, showcasing ads featuring cigarettes and e-cigarettes. The ads focus on the vicious cycle of stress, cravings, and nicotine addiction. They aim to direct individuals to free resources for quitting. The campaign was unveiled on April 8, 2026 in Washington.

data.title: Inclusive Research Starts Locally: Improving Trial Readiness Through Community‑Based Models, Upcoming Webinar Hosted by Xtalks
data.description: Join our upcoming free webinar to learn about research models that alleviate patient burden, enhance access, and boost participation across various populations. Our expert speakers will discuss effective strategies for integrating community-centered engagement approaches. The webinar will feature valuable insights on increasing participation in research initiatives and improving access for diverse communities. Don't miss this opportunity to discover innovative solutions for enhancing community involvement in research.

data.title: The Draft Pro® Launches Free $1,000,000 Perfect Draft® Challenge Ahead of the 2026 NFL Draft
data.description: On April 8, 2026, in Las Vegas, a mock draft competition app called The Draft Pro® has announced the debut of its primary contest, the Perfect Draft® Challenge. This nationwide competition is free to enter and participants are required to predict the exact order of all 32 first-round NFL Draft picks. The challenge offers participants a chance to win prizes.

data.title: Golconda Gallium Metallurgy Results from The Company's Golconda Project in Arizona Validate Potential Strategic Supply of U.S.-produced Gallium for Defense and Semiconductor Applications
data.description: In Tucson, Arizona, on April 8, 2026, G50 Corp Limited (ASX: G50; OTCQX: GFTYF) shared promising news. The company reported successful metallurgical test outcomes from its Golconda Project in Arizona. These results confirm the capability to generate a gallium-rich concentrate at the site. This process is achieved using established, cost-effective methods.

data.title: Neinor Homes reiterates 2026–27 guidance backed by strong visibility, resilient margins and robust housing market fundamentals
data.description: During its Annual General Meeting, Neinor Homes, the prominent residential developer in Spain, reaffirmed its guidance for the years 2026-2027.

data.title: CACI Schedules Fiscal Year 2026 Third Quarter Conference Call
data.description: RESTON, Va.--CACI International Inc (NYSE: CACI) is set to announce its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal year 2026 post-market close on Wednesday, April 22. A conference call has been scheduled for the following day, April 23 at 8:00 a.m. Eastern time, where key executives will delve into the quarterly performance, followed by a Q&A session. Interested parties can tune in to the call and access relevant materials on CACI’s Investor Relations platform.
